local_transform.review_gate: Replace or confirm with canyon working CRS and river-mile stationing before solver, cross-section, or Unreal coordinate authority.

promotion_gates: Confirm station zero, downstream direction, and river-mile relation with NPS/GCMRC references, DEM slope, Reclamation/USGS flow context, and oarsman/geospatial review.
Replace the preview equirectangular transform with the selected canyon working CRS before metric authoring.
Compare station samples against NAIP water edge, 3DEP terrain, release-dependent wet banks, sandbars, camps/access sensitivity, and rapid annotations.
Use left normals only as cross-section seeds until reviewed banks, shelves, eddies, sandbars, side channels, and hazard polygons are attached.
